name: Suspicious Driver Load from Temp
description: Detection of a driver being loaded from a temporary directory. Adversaries may place malicious drivers in temporary directories to achieve persistence and evade security defenses, which is a common persistence technique.

prompts.prompt: A critical alert has been triggered on the host **{host}**: a driver was loaded from a temporary directory, **{image}**. This is a strong indicator of **Persistence** and **Create or Modify System Process** (**MITRE ATT&CK T1543**) where an adversary is attempting to establish a foothold by loading a malicious driver. Immediate investigation is required to determine the legitimacy of this action and to remove the malicious driver. The event occurred under the user **{user}**.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The name of the host where the event occurred.

parameters.name: image
parameters.description: The path of the driver that was loaded.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account that performed the action.
